# GASsma

> GASsma is a Google Apps Script (GAS) library that lets you operate Google Sheets like a database with a Prisma-like, type-safe API. It provides CRUD operations, filtering, sorting, pagination, aggregation, relations, and nested writes on spreadsheet data.

Install with `npm i gassma` for local development (clasp + bundler), or add it as a GAS library with Script ID `1ZVuWMUYs4hVKDCcP3nVw74AY48VqLm50wRceKIQLFKL0wf4Hyou-FIBH`.

The documentation pages linked below are in Japanese (the site's default locale). An English version of every page is available by replacing `/docs/` with `/en/docs/` in the URL.

## Getting Started

- [What is GASsma](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/intro): Overview and motivation: why plain GAS spreadsheet code is hard to maintain (getRange counting mistakes, formula injection) and how GASsma solves it
- [Installation](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/installation): How to install GASsma in the GAS script editor or via npm for local development
- [Basics](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/basic): Initializing GassmaClient, accessing sheets, constructor options, and the common query options (where, select, omit, orderBy, take, skip)

## Reading Data

- [findFirst](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/read/findFirst): Get the first record matching a where filter, or null if none matches
- [findFirstOrThrow](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/read/findFirstOrThrow): Like findFirst but throws NotFoundError when no record matches
- [findMany](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/read/findMany): Get multiple records with where, orderBy, take/skip, cursor pagination, and distinct

## Writing Data

- [create](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/create/create): Create a single record; supports select/omit/include and nested writes
- [createMany](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/create/createMany): Create multiple records at once and get the created count
- [createManyAndReturn](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/create/createManyAndReturn): Create multiple records and return the created records
- [update](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/update/update): Update a single record; supports atomic number operations (increment/decrement/multiply/divide) and nested writes
- [updateMany](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/update/updateMany): Update all matching records and get the updated count; supports limit
- [updateManyAndReturn](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/update/updateManyAndReturn): Update all matching records and return the updated records
- [upsert](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/update/upsert): Update a record if it exists, otherwise create it
- [delete](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/delete/delete): Delete a single record and return it
- [deleteMany](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/crud/delete/deleteMany): Delete all matching records and get the deleted count; supports limit

## Aggregation

- [count](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/statistics/count): Count records matching a filter
- [aggregate](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/statistics/aggregate): Compute aggregations such as _avg, _sum, _min, _max, and _count
- [groupBy](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/statistics/groupBy): Group records by fields, aggregate per group, and filter groups with having

## Relations

- [Relation definition](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/relation/definition): Defining oneToMany, oneToOne, manyToOne, and manyToMany relations between sheets
- [include](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/relation/include): Fetch related records with where/orderBy/select options, nested include, and relation _count
- [where relation filter](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/relation/where-relation-filter): Filter by related records using some/every/none (list relations) and is/isNot (single relations)
- [Nested Write (create)](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/relation/nested-write): Write related records inside create using create/connect/connectOrCreate
- [Nested Write (update)](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/relation/nested-write-update): Modify related records inside update using update/delete/deleteMany/disconnect/set
- [onDelete](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/relation/on-delete): Referential actions on delete (Cascade, SetNull, Restrict, NoAction)
- [onUpdate](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/relation/on-update): Referential actions on update (Cascade, SetNull, Restrict, NoAction)

## Configuration

- [defaults](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/config/defaults): Auto-set field values on create with static values or functions (@default)
- [updatedAt](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/config/updated-at): Auto-set timestamps on create/update (@updatedAt)
- [Global omit](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/config/global-omit): Exclude fields from results by default per sheet
- [ignore / ignoreSheets](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/config/ignore): Exclude fields or whole sheets from all operations (@ignore / @@ignore)
- [map / mapSheets](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/config/map): Map code-side names to spreadsheet headers and sheet names (@map / @@map)
- [autoincrement](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/config/autoincrement): Auto-increment fields using LockService + PropertiesService (GAS only)
- [changeSettings](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/settings/changeSettings): Configure the data range of a sheet (start row and column range)

## Advanced

- [fields (column-to-column comparison)](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/fields): Compare columns within the same row in where filters using FieldRef
- [Local development with a Prisma schema](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/type-generation): Generate a type-safe client from a Prisma-format schema with the gassma CLI (generate/init/validate/format) and gassma.config.ts
- [Error reference](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/docs/reference/errors): List of error classes thrown by GASsma and when they occur

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://akahoshi1421.github.io/gassma-reference/llms-full.txt): Complete technical specification of GASsma in a single file, including edge cases and detailed behaviors
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/akahoshi1421/gassma): Source code, issues, and examples
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/gassma): Package details and release history
